message:
fix(sync): resolve lost-wakeup chain in mutex and rwlock drop paths

When multiple queued lock waiters were dropped in sequence without
polling, the baton-passing logic failed to propagate the wake to the
next live waiter. Fix mutex by unconditionally waking the front waiter
when the lock is free on drop. Remove dead writer-wake logic from
rwlock ReadFuture drop since read_unlock handles that responsibility.

Add tests/lost_wakeup_bug.rs as a standalone reproduction harness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
